title: Supreme Court upholds acquittal of son and daughter-in-law accused of burning parents alive
description: The Supreme Court recently upheld the acquittal of a man and his wife who had been accused of burning the man’s parents alive by setting their hut on fire [Sanjay Kumar Sharma vs. State of Bihar & Ors.]. A Bench of Justices PV Sanjay Kumar and K Vinod Chandran took serious exception to the manner in which the investigation had been carried out, observing that excessive zeal in building a case can be as damaging as investigative lethargy.“Overzealous investigation is as fatal to pro
